nasb.text: They were the ones who spoke to Pharaoh king of Egypt about bringing out the sons of Israel from Egypt; it was the same Moses and Aaron.

esv.text: It was they who spoke to Pharaoh king of Egypt about bringing out the people of Israel from Egypt, this Moses and this Aaron.

cnv.text: 那對埃及王法老說要把以色列人從埃及領出來的，就是這摩西和亞倫。

ccb.text: 也是这二人要求埃及王法老让他们把以色列人带出埃及。
